channel.title: Posts on BeyondLab
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on BeyondLab

item.title: How to research and source homelab hardware without breaking the bank
item.description: You don't need to spend a fortune to build a capable homelab. Here's how I research, evaluate, and source hardware — and where to find the best deals.

item.title: My homelab hardware: the HP DL380 G6 breakdown
item.description: A look at the hardware running my homelab — an HP DL380 G6 I got for free, its specs, its tradeoffs, and what I'd buy if I had to start over.

item.title: What is a homelab and why you need one
item.description: A homelab is one of the best investments you can make as an IT professional

item.title: Why I started BeyondLab
item.description: Every blog has an origin story. Here's mine — and why I think documenting your IT journey is one of the best things you can do.

item.title: Welcome to BeyondLab
item.description: Why I started BeyondLab — documenting my journey from IT support engineer to homelabber.
